uplink.description: Heartbeat, positive air temperature (climate: air.temperature + air.relativeHumidity)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (temperature 22.53C, humidity 55%, battery 62%, snr 1.2).

uplink.description: Heartbeat, negative air temperature (sign bit set in byte 5)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; byte5=0x85 (sign + 5 deg), byte6=0x4b (0.75). Expected produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (-5.75C, 88%).
Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (EU868, DR1, txpower 8dBm, TH 60s).
Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (result 3, msgid 7).

uplink.description: Unknown uplink type (upstream returns null) -> error
uplink._note: High nibble 0x3 is not Register/Heartbeat/Acknowledge; upstream returns null. We surface an explicit error rather than a bare result.

errors: heartbeat message expects at least 10 bytes

uplink._note: Synthetic short payload guarding the heartbeat length check.
